# Coco Server | The AI-powered Enterprise Search, all in one space

> AI-friendly index of site content.

## Core Content
- [File Type Detection](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/enrichment/file_type_detection/): File Type Detection Processor #  Detects file types based on file extensions and sets appropriate metadata.
Configuration #     Parameter Type Default Description     message_field string documents …
- [Misc File Extraction](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/enrichment/file_extraction/): Misc File Extraction Processor #  Comprehensive file processing for various file types. Extracts text content, metadata, generates thumbnails, and performs face detection.
Configuration # …
- [Summary](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/enrichment/document_summarization/): Summary Processor #  Generates AI-powered document summaries and insights with structured analysis.
Configuration #     Parameter Type Required Default Description     message_field string documents …
- [Extract Tags](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/enrichment/extract_tags/): Extract Tags Processor #  Extracts structured tags from AI insights stored in document metadata using an LLM.
Configuration #     Parameter Type Required Default Description     message_field string …
- [Embedding](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/enrichment/document_embedding/): Embedding Processor #  Generates vector embeddings for document chunks using AI models.
This processor enables semantic search and retrieval by converting text chunks into dense vector …
- [Authentication](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/account/authentication/): Authentication #  Authentication Methods #  The API supports two methods of authentication:
1. Login API #  Use the X-API-TOKEN header with your token value.
Example request:
curl -XPOST …

Example request:
curl -H &amp;quot;Authorization: Bearer &amp;lt;access_token&amp;gt;&amp;quot; -XPOST …

- [Logout](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/account/logout/): Logout #  Logout API #  The Logout API securely logs the user out from the COCO server.
Example request:
curl -XPOST http://localhost:9000/account/logout

- [Attachment](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/attachment/): Attachment #  Attachment API are used to upload your local files to Coco server.
Upload attachment #  curl -X POST http://localhost:9000/attachment/_upload -F &amp;quot;files=LOCAL_FILE&amp;quot;
Example
curl …
